title: Cipher algorithms should be robust
description: Encryption algorithms are essential for protecting sensitive information and ensuring secure communication in various domains. They are used for several important reasons: Confidentiality, privacy, and intellectual property protection Security during transmission or on storage devices Data integrity, general trust, and authentication When selecting encryption algorithms, tools, or combinations, you should also consider two things: No encryption is unbreakable. The strength of an encryption algorithm is usually measured by the effort required to crack it within a reasonable time frame.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

noncompliant:
// Noncompliant - DES is a weak algorithm
var des = new DESCryptoServiceProvider();

// Noncompliant - DES is obsolete
SymmetricAlgorithm sa = DES.Create();

// Noncompliant - TripleDES is also weak
var des3 = new TripleDESCryptoServiceProvider();
compliant:
// Compliant - AES is a robust algorithm
var aes = new AesCryptoServiceProvider();

// Compliant - using AES
SymmetricAlgorithm sa = Aes.Create();

checks.message: Weak cipher algorithm detected. Use AES instead of DES or TripleDES for encryption.
